SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: GAP_MOPP_COPAY_OS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This variable was only populated from 2007 - 2012. It will only be populated if the plan has an 
enhanced benefit design with extra coverage in the gap. 
The coverage gap is technically referred to as the initial coverage limit (ICL) for the Part D benefit.
